title: FUNNEL COMPARISON — V7 vs V12-A (1000k, $100k)
root_cause: V12-A allowed signals when only 2/3 of (zone, BB touch, RSI soft) were true and did not require the V7 core gate (zone + BB + recent SAR flip + RSI soft), while also skipping V7 rolling-breakout cooldown and bb_regime=ranging filters. This inflated signal bars (27,272 vs 1,816) and entries (1,338 vs 203).
fix_applied: Added strict_v7 signal mode for Strategy A: mandatory core conditions, bb_regime ranging, ATR<=0.3, rolling 60m range gate (40 pips + 15m cooldown), ADX<35, re-entry-after-stop cooldown, and full funnel counters.

notes.v7_bars_passed_adx_filter: inferred as bars_reached_signal_scoring - blocked_adx_filter because V7 report does not store this gate directly
